function.name: size-features-by-property
function.description: Set the size of features dynamically based on a property value. Define rules to map property values to sizes in pixels.

layerId.description: The ID of the layer to resize. Default is 'points-layer'.

property.description: The feature property to use for sizing (e.g., 'type', 'category'). Not required when reset=true.

sizeRules.description: Array of rules mapping property values to sizes

size.description: The size in pixels for matching features

defaultSize.description: Default size in pixels for features that don't match any rule. Default is 8.

reset.description: Set to true to reset to uniform sizing. Default is false.
